titles.title: Regulation A+ Improvement Act of 2025
Regulation A+ Improvement Act of 2025
Regulation A+ Improvement Act of 2025
To amend the Securities Act of 1933 with respect to small company capital formation, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 28 - 23.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Financial Services. H. Rept. 119-526.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 451.

committee.name: House Financial Services
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Markup By, Referred To
